description: Log into Odoo (admin@example.com / admin, database: odoo_demo) to configure a long-term procurement contract and execute an initial order. With the Purchase Agreements feature enabled, create a confirmed Blanket Order agreement with vendor 'SoundWave Solutions Inc.' for 1000 units of 'Acoustic Isolation Panel' at a negotiated price of $42.00 per unit. Create and confirm a purchase order for 50 units linked to this agreement.
